headline: 暑期档热浪来袭，新片竞相登场
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up with New Releases
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》《火遮眼》等片领跑热度，《福尔摩斯小姐3》《玩具总动员5》蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but this week's hits include 'Obsession' and 'Blazing Eyes', with 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Toy Story 5' on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' release date sparks anticipation

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人6：燃烧》预告片发布在即
